What was that noise?: Must be those Brigands playing games.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 「一定是那些山賊在玩把戲。」

What was that noise?: I guess I'm just getting jumpy.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 「我想我只是有點緊張罷了。」

What was that noise?: Is anyone there?
「那是什麼聲音?」: 「有人在嗎?」

What was that noise?: This place is spooky.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 「這地方陰森森的。」

What was that noise?: Before you can escape, the Minotaur is upon you!
「那是什麼聲音?」: 還沒等你逃開，牛頭怪已經撲向你!

What was that noise?: You hear a snick as the hasp on the gate is opened.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 你聽到一聲輕響，大門的門栓被打開了。

What was that noise?: DING DING DING DING....  Well, maybe the brigands aren't such inhospitable creatures after all.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 「叮叮叮叮……」好吧，也許山賊也不是那麼不好客嘛。

What was that noise?: Then again, maybe they are.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 不過話說回來，說不定他們是。

What was that noise?: There is no magical aura present.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 偵測不到任何魔法氣息。

What was that noise?: Sheer cliff walls form a narrow box canyon where the brigands have built a fortress.  There is a pile of debris where the steep cliff walls meet the fortress.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 陡峭的懸崖圍成狹窄的盒狀峽谷，山賊在此建造了堡壘。陡峭的懸崖與堡壘交會處有堆積的瓦礫。

What was that noise?: You see a large Minotaur patrolling the canyon.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 你看到一隻碩大的牛頭怪在峽谷巡邏。

What was that noise?: To the Minotaur, you look like a nice meal.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 對牛頭怪來說，你就像一頓美餐。

What was that noise?: His aim in life is to make shish kebab.  I hope you're not skewered.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 他的人生目標是烤肉串。希望你別被串成烤肉。

What was that noise?: Life as an archer is never dull nor pointless.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 弓箭手的日子既不沉悶也不無聊。

What was that noise?: He has an arrow with your name on it.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 他手上有支刻著你名字的箭。

What was that noise?: He has an IQ so low he can't spell IQ.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 他的智商低到連「智商」的英文都拼不出來。

What was that noise?: You grin sheepishly; the door has no lock, and swings open at your touch.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 你尷尬地笑了；門上沒有鎖，輕輕一推就開了。

What was that noise?: If that ISN'T the safe way out of here, you are probably going to become an ex-hero.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 如果這不是逃出去的安全方式，你大概會成為「前任英雄」。

What was that noise?: It looks like a plain, simple, harmless box to you.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 在你眼裡，這就是個普通、簡單、人畜無害的盒子。

What was that noise?: Your life is in grave danger and you want to play with toys?  What kind of hero are you?
「那是什麼聲音?」: 你的性命正在危險中，還想玩玩具?你算什麼英雄?

What was that noise?: Your life is in grave danger and you want to play with toys? What kind of hero are you?
「那是什麼聲音?」: 你的性命正在危險中，還想玩玩具?你算什麼英雄?

What was that noise?: The chasm is too wide to jump and too deep to climb.  There seem to be a number of porcupines at the bottom.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 裂谷太寬無法跳過，太深無法爬下。底部似乎有不少豪豬。

What was that noise?: Empty wine barrels.  The winters here are very cold.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 空酒桶。這裡的冬天非常寒冷。

What was that noise?: It's a fortification for archers to stand behind.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 這是弓箭手用來躲藏的防禦工事。

What was that noise?: They're too heavy to carry.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 它們太重，搬不動。

What was that noise?: Sacks of grain.  Stored for the winter.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 一袋袋穀物。為冬天儲存的。

What was that noise?: You can't see through the windows from here.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 你從這裡看不穿窗戶。

What was that noise?: You see a group of brigands playing cards.  One looks back at you in surprise and starts yelling.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 你看到一群山賊在打牌。其中一個驚訝地轉身看著你，開始大喊。

What was that noise?: All that can be seen through the window are vague shapes and outlines.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 從窗戶透過去只能看到模糊的身影和輪廓。

What was that noise?: Hey!  Even the most rudimentary hero knows that the way to deal with a tripwire is to step over it, not cut it.  Now that you now it's there, you'll avoid it.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 嘿!連最初級的英雄都知道對付絆絲的辦法是跨過去，不是剪斷它。既然你現在知道它在那裡，你就可以閃避它。

What was that noise?: You feel a trip wire.  Why, those sneaky brigands!  Now that you know it's there, you can easily step over it.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 你摸到了一根絆絲。那些狡猾的山賊!既然你知道它在那裡，就可以輕鬆跨過去。

What was that noise?: There is a dark rope stretched tautly across the path.  Now that you know it's there, you can easily avoid it by stepping over it.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 一根深色繩子繃得緊緊地橫在路上。既然你現在知道它在那裡，就可以輕鬆地跨過去避開它。

What was that noise?: You hear a snick as the hasp on the Jack in the Box is released.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 你聽到跳跳盒上的門栓被打開時發出的輕響。

What was that noise?: That was a useless gesture.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 那是個無用的動作。

What was that noise?: None of the brigands notices your Calm spell.  There is too much negative thought energy here.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 沒有山賊注意到你的鎮定術。這裡的負面思想能量太強了。

What was that noise?: No spells are active here.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 這裡沒有任何法術生效。

What was that noise?: This is not what you expected the brigands' fortress to look like in your imagination.  The barracks with the open half-doors to the east and west are fairly normal looking.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 這和你想像中山賊要塞的樣子完全不同。東西兩側有著半開門的兵營看起來相當正常。

What was that noise?: The carpet lying near the gate, however, is a bit odd. The small chasm in the middle of this yard with the bridge across it seems strange, too.  There are two blockades near the gate and some barriers near the north.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 不過，靠近大門的地毯看起來有點古怪。院子中央那條有橋跨越的小裂谷也挺奇怪的。大門附近有兩道障礙，北邊也有些屏障。

What was that noise?: That was a useless spell.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 那是個無用的法術。

What was that noise?: The rug is too big to put into your backpack and too heavy to carry around. You do notice a pit trap under the spread-out carpet.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 地毯太大放不進背包，也太重搬不動。不過你注意到攤開的地毯下有個陷阱。

What was that noise?: The carpets look rather new, perhaps recently stolen from the merchant in town.  There is a sign on the red carpet which reads, "Step Here".  It's written in a shaky hand, as if the author was laughing at the time he wrote it.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 地毯看起來相當新，也許是最近從城裡商人那兒偷來的。紅地毯上有個牌子寫著「踩這裡」。字跡歪斜，彷彿作者寫字時在暗笑。

What was that noise?: Sturdy looking bridge with two support poles across the chasm.  A message (written in a clear, firm hand) reading "Cross Here" is on this bridge.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 堅固的橋，有兩根支柱橫跨裂谷。橋上有則訊息，用清晰有力的字跡寫著「走這邊」。

What was that noise?: There is a single pole supporting this sturdy looking bridge across the chasm.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 一根支柱撐著這座堅固的橋，橫跨裂谷。

What was that noise?: The back door.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 後門。

What was that noise?: They remind you of a bunch of Knochelkopfs.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 它們讓你想起一群 Knochelkopfs(碰頭怪)。

What was that noise?: There is a chandelier with a rope attached.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 有一盞吊燈上面綁著繩子。

What was that noise?: The door is already blocked.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 門已經被堵住了。

What was that noise?: No time for that again (although it WAS fun).  Just get the heck outta here.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 現在沒時間再玩了(雖然確實很好玩)。趕快逃出這鬼地方。

What was that noise?: The chandelier is out of your reach.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 吊燈超出你夠得著的範圍。

What was that noise?: Chandelier, used to hold up the rope.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 吊燈，用來吊著繩子。

What was that noise?: He's been drinking Troll's sweat all night.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 他整晚都在喝巨魔汗水酒。

What was that noise?: The front door is already barred.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 前門已經被封住了。

What was that noise?: The floor is strewn with flotsam and jetsam.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 地板上散落著各種廢棄物。

What was that noise?: You close and bar the door.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 你關上門並用木條封住了。

What was that noise?: Oh, a wise guy, eh?
「那是什麼聲音?」: 「喔，你想耍聰明啊?」

What was that noise?: There's no need to knock this guy out; the Troll's Sweat he's been drinking has already done the job for you.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 不必敲昏這傢伙；他喝的巨魔汗水酒已經替你做好這件事了。

What was that noise?: You move the chair in front of the door.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 你移動椅子到門前。

What was that noise?: Wooden tables, benches, and chairs fill the space of this brigand meeting area.  A chandelier lights the room and  an unlit candelabra stands in the corner.  A rope hangs from the chandelier.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 木桌、長凳和椅子填滿了這個山賊集會區。一盞吊燈照亮房間，角落裡站著盞未點燃的燭台。繩子從吊燈垂下。

What was that noise?: None of the doors are locked.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 沒有任何門被鎖上。

What was that noise?: Leave the rope alone for now.  It's serving a very important function by holding up the chandelier.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 先別動繩子。它現在的功用很重要——吊著吊燈。

What was that noise?: The rope holds up the chandelier.  It's used to lower the chandelier so that it can be lit.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 繩子吊著吊燈。它被用來放低吊燈好點燃它。

What was that noise?: Most of the tables are grimy with dried beer and such.  The head table, though, is clean.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 大部分的桌子都粘著乾燥的啤酒漬之類的東西。不過主桌看起來很乾淨。

What was that noise?: You begin toppling the candelabra.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 你開始推倒燭台。

What was that noise?: The candelabra has already fallen.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 燭台已經倒下了。

What was that noise?: Sturdy-looking device for holding candles.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 看起來很堅固的燭台。

What was that noise?: You can't do that from where you're standing.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 你從現在的位置做不了這件事。

What was that noise?: In the "upstairs" doorway, there is a chain with a handle attached.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 在「樓上」的門口，有條綁著把手的鍊子。

What was that noise?: You're not close enough.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 你離得不夠近。

What was that noise?: Get closer.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 靠近點。

What was that noise?: Have a nice day!
「那是什麼聲音?」: 「祝你今天愉快!」

What was that noise?: It's a box of some sort...or so the sign says.  There is a button on the box.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 這是某種盒子……至少牌子是這麼說的。盒子上有個按鈕。

What was that noise?: You'll have to get closer.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 你得靠近點。

What was that noise?: It looks a button, but you'll have to be closer to push it.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 看起來像個按鈕，不過你得靠近點才能按它。

What was that noise?: Engraved on the button are the words: "PUSH ME".
「那是什麼聲音?」: 按鈕上刻著「按我」。

What was that noise?: Oops!  You thought this door led SOMEWHERE!
「那是什麼聲音?」: 「哎呀!你以為這扇門會通往某個地方!」

What was that noise?: What a miserable experience!
「那是什麼聲音?」: 「多麼慘烈的經歷!」

What was that noise?: You dare not unbar the door.  You hear hordes of brigands massing beyond it.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 你不敢打開門。你聽到成群山賊在門外集結。

What was that noise?: You can't do it.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 你辦不到。

What was that noise?: Elsa is right next door.  I'll go set up the secret exit for your escape.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 「艾爾莎就在隔壁。我去準備秘密出口好讓你逃脫。」

What was that noise?: You bar the door behind you.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 你在身後用木條封住門。

What was that noise?: You behold a most fascinating place.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 你看到了一個最迷人的地方。

What was that noise?: The person labeled "ME" speaks:
「那是什麼聲音?」: 被標籤為「我」的人說話了：

What was that noise?: Abandon mope, all ye who enter here!
「那是什麼聲音?」: 「所有進入此地者，都要拋棄悶悶不樂!」

What was that noise?: Job hunting, or just sight-seeing?
「那是什麼聲音?」: 「在找工作，還是只是來觀光?」

What was that noise?: I foresee a brilliant future for you in the fall.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 「我預見你的輝煌未來…會在秋天到來。」

What was that noise?: If you've got something to say, then speak fast or forever hold your pieces.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 「如果你想說什麼，就說快點，要不就永遠閉嘴。」

What was that noise?: State your case before I case your estate!
「那是什麼聲音?」: 「在我接收你的遺產之前，先陳述你的理由!」

What was that noise?: It would serve no purpose.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 那沒有用。

What was that noise?: You feel disoriented.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 你感到暈眩。

What was that noise?: How does he DO this?
「那是什麼聲音?」: 他到底是怎麼做到的?

What was that noise?: There's an ECHO IN HERE... Echo In Here... echo in here...
「那是什麼聲音?」: 這裡有回音……有回音……有回音……

What was that noise?: M. C. Escher would LOVE this place.
「那是什麼聲音?」: M. C. 艾舍爾一定會愛上這個地方。

What was that noise?: OK, enough fooling around!
「那是什麼聲音?」: 好吧，別亂來了!

What was that noise?: This is getting old!
「那是什麼聲音?」: 這傢伙太老了!

What was that noise?: A person COULD get used to this.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 人是有可能習慣這個的。

What was that noise?: Your magic has no effect.  It must be something about this room.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 你的魔法沒有效果。一定是這房間的關係。

What was that noise?: ME sees you preparing your spell and...
「那是什麼聲音?」: 「我」看到你在準備法術，然後……

What was that noise?: Nothing is locked.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 沒有任何東西被鎖上。

What was that noise?: There is a deep pit with a walkway winding above it.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 有個深坑，上面有條蜿蜒的走道。

What was that noise?: There appear to be stairs leading up (?) to nowhere.  There is also what looks like a bowl full of fireflies.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 似乎有些階梯通往(?)無處可去。還有個看起來裝滿螢火蟲的碗。

What was that noise?: With the Brigands pounding at the door, you decide not to rest until you're safe.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 山賊在門上狂敲，你決定在安全前不休息。

What was that noise?: Stairs lead up to the platform on which "ME" is located.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 階梯通往「我」所在的平台。

What was that noise?: Why would you want to throw that?
「那是什麼聲音?」: 你為什麼想丟那個?

What was that noise?: No more talking, my friend.  Let's have fun!
「那是什麼聲音?」: 「別再囉唆了，我的朋友。我們來玩樂!」

What was that noise?: You're too busy.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 你太忙了。

What was that noise?: It looks like the talking is over.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 「看來談話結束了。」

What was that noise?: Would he be surprised to see his little girl now!
「那是什麼聲音?」: 「要是他現在看到他的小女兒，一定會大吃一驚!」

What was that noise?: Everybody needs to know a few magic tricks to get by these days.  You'd be surprised how effective Sleeping Powder is for taking out the guards of a caravan.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 「現在誰都得知道幾招魔法才能活下去。你會驚訝於催眠粉對付商隊守衛有多有效。」

What was that noise?: You know about the enchantment?  Then perhaps you have come to help. Perhaps you are able to take the child from the band.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 「你知道詛咒的事?那你可能是來幫忙的。也許你有辦法把孩子從山賊手中救出。」

What was that noise?: Elsa doesn't know who she really is.  That's part of the enchantment.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 「艾爾莎不知道她真正是誰。那是詛咒的一部分。」

What was that noise?: When Elsa was left with some brigands ten years ago, all her memories were taken away from her.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 「十年前艾爾莎被留給山賊時，她的所有記憶都被奪走了。」

What was that noise?: I borrowed a Magic Mirror from a friend to try to break the spell, but it only works when spells are cast directly at you.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 「我從朋友那兒借了面魔鏡想破解詛咒，不過它只有在法術直接施加在你身上時才有效。」

What was that noise?: If you're going to be the big Hero, I hope you brought a Dispel Potion or something.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 「如果你要做大英雄，希望你帶了解除詛咒藥劑之類的。」

What was that noise?: The true Dispel Potion will break an enchantment.  You must splash the potion on Elsa as soon as you can, or she'll skewer you for sure.  She's more than a match for old 'Swordy Lordy' now!
「那是什麼聲音?」: 「真正的解除詛咒藥劑能破解任何詛咒。你得盡快把藥劑潑在艾爾莎身上，否則她一定會把你串成烤肉。她現在比「劍客勳爵」還要強得多!」

What was that noise?: You know Elsa?  Then perhaps you have come to help.  Perhaps you are able to take the child from the band.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 「你認識艾爾莎?那你可能是來幫忙的。也許你有辦法把孩子從山賊手中救出。」

What was that noise?: After you have explained what you know about Elsa, Yorick speaks:
「那是什麼聲音?」: 在你解釋了你對艾爾莎的了解後，尤瑞克說話了：

What was that noise?: It's about time that someone else helped Elsa before it's too late! Toro and I are the only friends she's got here.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 「是時候該有人在太晚前幫助艾爾莎了!我和托羅是她在這兒唯一的朋友。」

What was that noise?: She's a lot like her dad, though.  She organized these brigands and changed them from mere thugs to major raiders!
「那是什麼聲音?」: 「不過她很像她爸爸。她組織了這些山賊，把他們從小流氓變成大盜匪!」

What was that noise?: She plans to move the entire band away from the valley as soon as the snow clears.  If that happens, I know she will never be disenchanted.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 「她計畫一旦積雪融化就帶著整個幫派離開山谷。要是那樣，我就知道她永遠不會被解除詛咒。」

What was that noise?: There are plenty of doors.  You wouldn't want me to spoil your fun, now!
「那是什麼聲音?」: 「門多著呢。你應該不想我毀了你的樂趣吧!」

What was that noise?: Either you'll figure it out in the end, or you'll end it before you're out.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 「你要不最後想通，要不就在逃出去前把自己終結。」

What was that noise?: This fort is the brigand's palace.  It has been well-constructed.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 「這座要塞是山賊的宮殿。蓋得相當不錯。」

What was that noise?: For thirty years I was the Court Jester.  Now I jest enjoy watching other people take the pratfalls.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 「三十年來我都是宮廷弄臣。現在我只是喜歡看別人出洋相。」

What was that noise?: I'll protect the Brigand Leader with everything I've got.  That's no laughing matter as I get madder.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 「我會用盡全力保護山賊首領。這不是開玩笑，當我生氣時尤其如此。」

What was that noise?: This room is my way of keeping the brigands from bothering the Leader about raises, since it tends to raze the brigands.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 「這個房間是我用來阻止山賊向首領要求加薪的辦法，因為它會把山賊消滅掉。」

What was that noise?: I designed it myself!  This place has people rolling in the aisles.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 「我自己設計的!這地方會讓人笑得滾來滾去。」

What was that noise?: Can't you see that I am he?  I try to inspire (before they expire) a sense of awe and majesty in those that enter here.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 「你沒看出來我就是他嗎?我試圖在進入這裡的人心中喚起(在他們完蛋前)敬畏和威嚴的感受。」

What was that noise?: After all, I am the Brigand Warlock.  One has to keep up one's appearances, or appear to keep up with one's peers.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 「畢竟，我是山賊巫師。一個人必須維持自己的門面，或看起來要跟上自己的同僚。」

What was that noise?: Toro is the minotaur that guards this fortress.  Elsa found him when he was just a calf, and he's kowtowed to her ever since.
「那是什麼聲音?」: 「托羅是守衛這座要塞的牛頭怪。艾爾莎在他還是牛犢時找到他，他從那時起就對她言聽計從。」
